system.description:
Picks pockets and cuts purses within 5': +4 if the target is unaware. Success lifts one pocket's contents or one hung item/tiny/small weapon. On a natural 1 or a roll below half the target value, the victim notices (reaction roll at -3).

Auto-scales with the owner's class level in party rolls (RR p. 31): L1: 17+ · L2: 16+ · L3: 15+ · L4: 14+ · L5: 13+ · L6: 12+ · L7: 10+ · L8: 8+ · L9: 6+ · L10: 4+ · L11: 2+ · L12: 0+ · L13: -2+ · L14: -4+. For a class using the skill at half level, set the module's levelFactor flag to 0.5.
